APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Continued To Apr-18-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. GEOFFREY MACBRIDE, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney (tel: 415-962-2853) for Plaintiff.
Defendant MELVIN LEE, in pro per present with Teresa Wong.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF MURPHY, PEARSON, BRADLEY & FEENEY, P.C.'s APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

Matter discussed. The Court notes the defendant failed to file an opposition and to contest the Court's tentative ruling in a timely fashion. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court continues the matter to April 18, 2024 at 9:30 A.M. Defendant may file an opposition prior to the hearing.

Judge; Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
